title: Context Preservation Strategies for ChatGPT Apps | MakeAIHQ
body: 3. Entity-First Preservation. Always preserve tracked entities (customers, orders, dates) even when compressing: Extract entities before compression. Re-inject entities into compressed context. Validate entity presence in final context.
